summary: Hot show with an amazing drums‑in‑space segment; recording quality not described
review: The reviewer was thrilled by the performance, calling the concert "HOT" and singling out the extended drums‑in‑space section as a highlight. No details about the actual audio source or sound clarity are given, only a wish for a soundboard version to capture those drums.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review praises the musical performance but provides no information on recording quality, limiting confidence in a precise rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not comment on sound clarity or mix; only expresses desire for an SBD to hear the drums better.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Reviewer mentions seeing Jerry at the Wharf before the show, indicating his presence but no performance detail.
band_member_comments.Drums: Described as "amazing" during the Space segment; drums in space singled out as a highlight.
